name: keyframe
description: Index videos and animated GIFs locally, then retrieve timestamped transcript, OCR, code, and frames through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Search what videos say and GIFs show
interface.longDescription: Keyframe locally indexes public or local videos and animated GIFs, then retrieves timestamped transcript, on-screen text, reconstructed code, and source frames for verification.
defaultPrompt: Index this tutorial and cite where the key idea is said and shown.
Find code shown in this video and verify it against the source frame.
Use this video to implement the demonstrated change and run its tests.
